import React from 'react'; import Amenities from './Amenities.js'; import HouseRules from './HouseRules.js'; import HealthAndSafety from './HealthAndSafety.js'; import CancellationPolicy from './CancellationPolicy.js'; import {Link, useLocation} from "react-router-dom"; import Footer from './Footer.js'; import Header from './Header.js'; export default function Temp({property}) { let location = useLocation(); console.log(location); return ( // <> // {location.state.description}
// Guests: {location.state.beds}
// Bedrooms: {location.state.bedrooms}
// Beds: {location.state.beds}

// Baths: {location.state.baths}
// Cleaning Fees: ${location.state.cleaningFee}
// Service Fees: ${location.state.serviceFee}
// Ameneties: {location.state.amenities}
// Stars: {location.state.reviews.stars}
// Total Reviews: {location.state.reviews.totalReviews}
// <>

{location.state.title}
